title: bridge-teams axum router missing DefaultBodyLimit allows large-payload DoS
description: bridge-teams/src/bridge.rs sets up an axum router for POST /teams/webhook with no DefaultBodyLimit layer. bridge-slack and bridge-matrix both add .layer(axum::extract::DefaultBodyLimit::max(1024 * 1024)). Without the limit, a sender can POST an arbitrarily large body, causing the bridge to buffer and process it before the HMAC check rejects it. Trigger: unauthenticated HTTP POST with a multi-MB body to the Teams webhook port.
